novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the draft must separate more sharply from Bennett et al.'s penalty-determined nuisance limits and add the closest regularized proximal workflow comparison, especially Kallus--Mao--Uehara 2021 minimax negative-control bridge estimation, before this can plausibly be flagship.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Upgrade Conjecture 1 from existence of two different quadratic selectors to a full characterization of the attainable selection range over admissible regularizers, ideally showing a dense or interval-valued image inside Theta_I(P).

Add a dedicated comparison to regularized/minimax proximal bridge estimators, especially Kallus--Mao--Uehara 2021 and the penalty-limit language in Bennett et al. 2023, stating exactly why their estimators do not already imply the proposed causal artifact theorem.

Make Conjecture 2 non-toy by requiring the binary witness to satisfy a nondegenerate observed law with both treatment arms, both proxy levels, and nonconstant conditional outcome means, so the obstruction is not just a hand-tuned fiber artifact.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison and strengthen Conjecture 1 to a selection-range or named-workflow theorem; current kernel is coherent but below the flagship floor.
